build.buildCommand: pnpm install && pnpm --filter unified-fitness-backend-v1 prisma:generate && pnpm --filter unified-fitness-backend-v1 build

deploy.startCommand: pnpm --filter unified-fitness-backend-v1 exec prisma db push --accept-data-loss && pnpm --filter unified-fitness-backend-v1 exec tsx prisma/seed.ts && pnpm --filter unified-fitness-backend-v1 exec tsx src/main.ts
